overall.description: First-person exploration through a geothermal landscape in a video game, featuring bison herds scattered across rocky terrain that transitions to colorful mineral deposits surrounding a vibrant turquoise hot spring under a bright blue sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit geothermal plain dotted with large scattered boulders. The camera moves steadily forward across the rocky dirt terrain toward a distant herd of bison, with dense pine forests lining the horizon under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky plain with active bison herd

events.description: a large bison gallops past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: moving through the bison herd, passing close to individual animals

bison grazing and moving across the rocky plain

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the bison herd, passing close to the large animals. At around 25 seconds, a bison passes very close to the camera and breaks into a gallop. The rocky terrain continues with scattered boulders moving from the center to the sides of the frame as the camera advances.

vibrant blue-green geothermal pool with steam rising

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the rocky terrain gives way to colorful orange and yellow mineral deposits. A vibrant turquoise hot spring becomes visible in the distance, with steam rising from its surface. Bison can be seen grazing near the far edge of the thermal feature.

scene_state.functional_zone: turquoise hot spring pool with mineral terraces

agents.ego_description: approaching the edge of the vibrant turquoise hot spring pool

entered.detail: steam rising from the geothermal features in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the edge of the stunning turquoise hot spring, with the colorful mineral deposits now filling the foreground. Steam rises from the geothermal pool, and the vibrant blue-green water contrasts sharply with the orange mineral terraces surrounding it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a sunlit geothermal plain that transforms from a rocky wilderness into a vibrant mineral landscape. It begins by gliding over dirt terrain dotted with large boulders toward a distant herd of bison, with dense pine forests framing the horizon under a bright blue sky. As the camera pushes through the herd, a bison passes closely and breaks into a gallop before the rocky ground gradually gives way to vivid orange and yellow mineral deposits. The scene then opens up to reveal a steaming turquoise hot spring in the distance, with grazing bison visible along its far edge. Finally, the camera reaches the edge of the geothermal pool, where the rising steam and brilliant blue-green water contrast sharply with the colorful mineral terraces filling the foreground.
